mechanics.excerpt: Each; of course hoped to be the first to redevelop the one weapon that would let them con- quer their neighbors and re-create the Star League under their leadership. Though reinventing the wheel took time by the fifth decade of the thirty-first century: the people of the Inner Sphere were beginning t0 reap the benefits of the rediscoveries_ The stan- dard of Wving rose a5 new medicines were introduced and fac- tories were repaired and upgraded after centuries of neglect.
